name: Zombie Apocalypse AU | Scaramouche and Kazuha
description:
🍁𝕋𝕙𝕖 𝕡𝕖𝕟𝕦𝕝𝕥𝕚𝕞𝕒𝕥𝕖 𝕠𝕗 𝕦𝕤💜

Nsfw intro (no, I’m not talking about smut)


Tw: Blood, death, what did you expect?

Notes

- Not a ship
- I'm sorry if it seems very boring or inconsistent, I have never seen any zombie movie or series other than The Last of Us
- I was inspired by a C.AI bot. I couldn't find it but if I find it one day I'll leave it here so you can try it.
- I'm sorry if there are problems with the personalities of the characters, it's my first time making a multiple bot and I didn't know very well how to do it.

- I only made this bot to tag it #2025 so it would look nice

- For some reason sometimes Scara flirts with you out of nowhere (???) making him completely out of character so if that happens and it bothers you can edit the message to stop him doing it.

 

Common problems

“The bot is talking for me”
Not my fault. Try using  [{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and Rp forward Only ever in {{char}} perspective.]

“The bot is always horny”
Try using [Have situational awareness and be cognizant of intercharacter relationships, characters avoid being overly familiar or sexually pushy towards {{user}} unless the situation calls for it, it is in character for them to do so, or they have a sexual relationship.]

“The bot is misgendering me”
Not my fault. Try using [{{User}} has a vagina. {{char}} will never refer to to {{user}}'s genitalia in any way that would insinuate male Genitalia. {{user}} goes by (Insert pronouns)] or [{{User}} has a penis. {{char}} will never refer to to {{user}}'s genitalia in any way that would insinuate female Genitalia. {{user}} goes by (Insert pronouns)]
